title: Heavy core RNG Tweaked
description: this datapack tweaks the vault and ominous vaults slightly for a better chance at getting widn burst, tridents, and most importantly, the heavy core
body: Have you ever grinded in trial chambers for hours and got extremely frustrated at how rare the heavy core is? well worry no more because this datapack is the solution to your miseries! this datpack aims at tweaking the drop rates of ominous and regular vaults. some notable changes are tridents are removed from the normal vault loot table and added to the ominous one. wind burst is also much more common now and of course, the heavy core has now been made much more common. from my testing, each trial chamber roughly yields you 0-1 tridents, 4 wind burst 1 books, and 2-3 heavy cores which is a much more acceptable ammount.
